title: Supported Drag Formats (DragFormat)
text: Supported Drag Formats (DragFormat) Specifies the drag-and-drop formats that can be used when dragging objects in this widget. DragFormat = DragFormatList Description DragFormatList is a Uniface list (GOLD ; separated) of format names. Tree Widget In a tree widget, the drag-and-drop properties are associated with tree item types. The property name incorporates the index number of the defined tree item types. Thus DragFormat1 defines the drag formats for the first defined tree item type. Applies To Image Name utree (Tree) Related Links Drag-and-Drop Formats Drag-and-drop formats are global objects that define drag and drop behavior, including the default action, pop-up menu, and icon that are available when performing drag and drop actions in the tree and picture widgets. They are not used for drag-and-drop widgets. Create and Maintain Drag-and-Drop Formats Drag-and-drop formats determine the actions and context menus for dragging and dropping objects in Tree and Picture widgets in desktop applications. They are maintained and deployed in a runtime library. Drag and Drop Behavior Drag and drop behavior enables the user to select an object and drag it to another location with the mouse. When the mouse button is released, the selected object is copied, moved, or linked to by a shortcut. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
